me.name: Milene Toazza
description: Hi! My name is Milene and I'm a Frontend Developer Specialist. My purpose is to transform ideas into high-quality digital products. With a professional journey that started in 2018, I am dedicated to building and evolving solutions, ensuring a great user experience backed by a solid, scalable, and secure technical foundation.

I am driven by continuous improvement and constantly seek to test and implement new technologies, tools, and patterns that optimize delivery and project longevity. I highly value feedback exchange as a driver of personal and collective growth.
- JavaScript | TypeScript | React | React Native | Node
